ddls:
CREATE TABLE "atmospheric_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the data was recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Recorded temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Recorded humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Recorded wind speed */,
  "modified_wind" REAL /* Modified wind speed considering additional factors */,
  "stability" TEXT /* Stability classification of the atmosphere */,
  "temperature_gradient" REAL /* Temperature gradient indicating the rate of change of temperature with height */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Recorded atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atmospheric_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speed_data" (
  "wind_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind speed record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the data was recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Recorded wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "gust_speed" REAL /* Speed of wind gusts */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "wind_gust_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of wind gusts */,
  "beaufort_scale" INTEGER /* Beaufort scale value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_speed_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temperature_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the data was recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Recorded temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "heat_index" REAL /* Heat index in degrees Celsius */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "apparent_temperature" REAL /* Apparent temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "feels_like_temperature" REAL /* Feels-like temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_data" (
  "humidity_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the data was recorded */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Recorded humidity in percentage */,
  "absolute_humidity" REAL /* Absolute humidity in grams per cubic meter */,
  "specific_humidity" REAL /* Specific humidity in grams per kilogram */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "vapor_pressure" REAL /* Vapor pressure in hPa */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stability_indices" (
  "stability_index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stability index record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the atmospheric record used to calculate the stability index */,
  "stability_classification" TEXT /* Stability classification based on the calculated index */,
  "stability_index_value" REAL /* Value of the stability index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the index was calculated */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the index was calculated */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the stability index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stability_index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stability_indices_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, meteorologist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the atmospheric record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the alert is issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature, wind speed) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* User or team responsible for resolving the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
